g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the student login step')

sendPrompt('How is the student context file built?')
sendPrompt('What is in the password generated files?')
sendPrompt('Where are the college rules stored?')
sendPrompt('Where is the context file saved?')

sendPrompt('Tell me about the LLaMA 70B model')

sendPrompt('How does text input work in the chatbot?')
sendPrompt('How does voice input work with Whisper?')
sendPrompt('How does the chatbot return the answer?')
